---
title: "Reveal.js Presentation"
format: revealjs
---

# Welcome

- TODO: Add introductory material here.

---

## VisualPDE Example

::: {.slide-panel}

### Reaction-diffusion system

::: {.equations}
$$
\begin{aligned}
\frac{\partial u}{\partial t} &= D_u \nabla^2 u + f(u, v), \\
\frac{\partial v}{\partial t} &= D_v \nabla^2 v + g(u, v)
\end{aligned}
$$
:::

::: {.iframe-panel}
<iframe title="VisualPDE simulation" class="visualpde-embed" src="https://visualpde.com/sim?-YHwBFg46BY6QUGQwgAKJ+f53XayJhEBOOgBywWikDBYFCkRc6IeUrA4vDspA8RcxgiaDD0rrDabLYAgo24LkwtawR3m2hvnAJRLQuLZOZsMOW-rDUQZM9FEw7fXGyP0Qa1MDIBw51uW+iXJaimp4i3rVQj520Oi-PESzdfZBZLfN-" frameborder="0"></iframe>
:::

:::

---

## Slide 3

> Add more sections with `---` between slides.

- Speaker notes can be added using `???`

---

## Thank you

- Visit your published page after deployment
- Customize the content in `index.qmd`
